title: Parkour Helper
description: Backwards-compatibility parkour features for map making and playing
body:
# Parkour Helper --- ## `/parkour` Configures various settings related to parkour. Syntax is identical to `/gamerule`. ### `sprint_leniency (true)` Whether or not hitting surfaces softly breaks sprint. Good for disabling in onlysprint maps. ### `allow_swimming (true)` Whether or not players can 1.13 swim. Disabling also enables sprinting when touching water ### `sneaking_player_height (1.5)` Self-explanatory ### `movement_snap_threshold (0.003)` ```if (Math.abs(yPosition) < movement_snap_threshold) {yPosition = 0.0d;}``` ### `allow_sprint_sneak (true)` Whether players can keep sprinting when they begin sneaking ### Functions There are also three functions (accessible via `/function`) that act as presets for compatibility with 1.8 and 1.12 maps, as well as one that resets everything to default (current version).

Happy parkouring!
